name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn


(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = p
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
                            /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : (p # q) => (state[p] = "critical" => state[q] # "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state



Next(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = FALSE
          /\ forks[Next(i)] = FALSE
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![Next(i)] = TRUE]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![Next(i)] = FALSE]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in Readers \in Seq \\
             /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in Readers \in Seq \\
                /\ r \notin readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = readers \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in Readers \in Seq \\
                /\ r \in readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : 
       /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys : 
       /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol

---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = Append(file, <<>>)
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, <<>>)
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>
